CustomField.description: *MUST* be the invoice recipient i.e. accounts payable & NOT the main technical contact - please check the PO to find the accounts contact or ASK for it. Other non-finance contacts can be added as contact 2 or 3 on the opp & will be copied on to invoices.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: *MUST* be the invoice recipient i.e. accounts payable & NOT the main technical contact - please check the PO to find the accounts contact or ASK for it. Other non-finance contacts can be added as contact 2 or 3 on the opp & will be copied on to invoices.
CustomField.label: Main Invoice Contact

lookupFilter.errorMessage: The main invoice contact does not belong to the account.
